data.title: Rakugaki
data.synopsis:
The moment the first gleam of sunlight trickled in gently stirring the folds of a shallow sleep—that was when the graffiti appeared...

(Source: Official Site)

data.title: Yi Wanjia Zhi Ming
data.synopsis:
In the city, people lived under the protection of a barrier, enjoying a peaceful life. Secretly, the Fortune Star agents of the Sword Bureau had been battling the calamity creatures for decades. When Fortune Star agents were kidnapped, the creatures swarmed the city, bringing devastation. The reclusive youth Chen Kefan, competing in an e-sports tournament, encountered an invasion of bloodblade bugs and witnessed the killer of his parents reappear. In the desperate fight, his latent Fortune Star power awakened, setting him on a path of revenge. Yet, as he and his comrades fought bloodily and risked their lives, they discovered that the apocalypse was merely a game played by the gods.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Jipin Tian Shi
data.synopsis:
The hero, gifted with extraordinary abilities and from a powerful Daoist sect, left his sect at his master's invitation to exorcise ghosts. After clearing two haunted houses, he became entangled in a series of bizarre events while facing challenges from various factions: he clashed with a Thai sorcerer, dealt a crushing blow to Japanese Onmyoji, fended off a Korean witch's challenge, and humiliated Western exorcists—defeating and banishing masters from across the world. In a realm where technology intertwined with the supernatural, he slayed demons and spirits, growing into a legendary Celestial Master.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of Zhuge Wolong's (诸葛卧龙) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Jinji Xingzhe
data.synopsis:
On the world's dark edge, forbidden powers are growing. When high schooler Yan Feng is drawn into a deadly incident, he joins a secret organization to save his sister, contain sinister artifacts, and battle villains bent on unleashing these powers. As the fight intensifies, he begins to uncover the truth about his own origins.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: 134 Yi Wang Ju
data.synopsis:
At the start of the new year, college student Chu Lan's ordinary life ended abruptly. With his loved ones dead and a demon possessing him, he was drawn into a thousand-year struggle of fate. He became both the "only key" to end the disaster and the "vessel of evil" that could destroy humanity. Forced by destiny, he joined a secret agency to break the endless cycle of the Spirit Calamity. Ultimately, he faced a choice at the end of the battle between good and evil.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Tianmu
data.synopsis:
The young Han Jin bore a future Dao embryo, wielded mystical powers, defeated nine dark realms, and overcame inner demons, forging a path to save humanity and defy fate.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Hai Ru Shenming
data.synopsis:
A tech giant corporation discovered an ancient time rift connecting higher-dimensional space. To monopolize energy, the tech giant concealed this discovery from the world. Its relentless exploitation eventually caused the temporal rift to go out of control, allowing non-Earthly spiritual energy to spread across the globe. Capitalizing on this upheaval, the giant accelerated its monopoly over the world. Gradually, more and more heroes capable of forging contracts with deities through spiritual energy united to oppose the evil forces intent on destroying humanity.

(Source: Youku)

titles.title: Tuer Ni Wudile Xiashan Qu Ba
徒儿你无敌了下山去吧

data.title: Tuer Ni Wudile Xiashan Qu Ba
data.title_japanese: 徒儿你无敌了下山去吧
data.synopsis:
The Ye family was suddenly massacred—Ye Beichen's parents and brothers were slaughtered, and he himself was ruthlessly thrown into the moat, clinging to life by a thread. Rescued by his senior sister, he was taken to Kunlun Mountain, where he spent five grueling years mastering martial arts. Five years later, he returned in full force, armed with the peerless skills taught by 99 invincible masters. Back in the mortal world, when faced with old enemies and powerful factions, Ye Beichen showed no fear. With extraordinary martial prowess and overwhelming strength, he unleashed chaos across the city, carving a path of revenge and dominance—turning the tables and crushing all who once sought his downfall.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of Qiu Qiu Ni Rang Wo Huo Ba's (求求你让我火吧) web novel, Tu Er Ni Wudile, Xiashan Qu Ba (徒儿你无敌了, 下山去吧).

data.title: Shang Cheng Zhixia
data.synopsis:
The inhabitants of the Upper City live in luxury high above the clouds, while those of the Lower City struggle to survive in a wasteland overrun by monstrous beasts and shrouded in poisonous miasma. Ning Fan, a poor student from the Lower City, becomes a wanderer who takes on high-risk jobs to earn money in order to save his mother. From then on, he steps into an endless killing field, leading his team to defy fate and ultimately shatter the heavenly ladder, determined to burn away the cage of destiny with a prairie fire.

(Source: Youku, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Li Ma's (李马) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Yi Zhan Cangqiong
data.synopsis:
In the darkest moment of Celestial Realm, the crippled youth Gu An seized the power of an ancient god amid life-or-death peril. Wielding infinite spiritual energy and a mortal blade, he destroyed evildoers, avenged deep grudges, and struck down the heavens.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Kai (ONA)
data.synopsis:
In an out-of-control world, survivors faced a thrilling and perilous apocalyptic battlefield.

(Source: Youku)
